title: Piel en Armonia | Precision Dermatology in Quito
description: Clinical dermatology and medical aesthetics with clear decisions, continuity, and secure booking in Quito.

slides.title: When skin changes, the first read must be precise.
slides.deck: Your route starts with medical assessment, visible evidence, and a clear next decision.

slides.title: Medical aesthetics is framed as protocol, never as promise.
slides.deck: Each program defines eligibility, timing, and limits before any procedure.

slides.title: Telemedicine when it clarifies. In-person care when the case requires it.

latest.title: Remote orientation can start without breaking clinical continuity.
The aesthetic family is organized by medical indication, not by sales noise.
Children and teenagers keep a dedicated entry point for family decisions.

featuredStories.title: Cause first. Route next.
featuredStories.deck: Lesions, acne, hair, and nails open with a medical module that is clear, calm, and evidence-led.

featuredStories.title: Each procedure opens with fit, timing, and follow-up.
featuredStories.deck: The page explains indication and limits before the form to protect your decision quality.

featuredStories.title: Pediatric dermatology with its own structure.
featuredStories.deck: Dermatitis, teen acne, and warts are presented with a clear sequence for families and caregivers.

telemedicine.title: Remote care integrated into the same clinical system.
telemedicine.deck: Video, phone, or WhatsApp for early guidance, with in-person escalation when needed.
points: Remote intake with clinically useful context
